name: github
description: Manage GitHub pull requests, commits, releases, and MCP integration via the GitHub API.

interface.shortDescription: Manage pull requests, commits, releases, and GitHub MCP integration.
interface.longDescription: GitHub plugin provides agents with skills for managing GitHub pull requests, commits, releases, and MCP-powered GitHub API access. Automate version control workflows, review pull requests, create releases, and commit code changes directly through the GitHub API.
defaultPrompt: Create a pull request on GitHub with a title, body, base branch, and head branch using the repository details.
Commit changes to a GitHub repository with a descriptive message and author information.
Create a new GitHub release with tag, release notes, and optional assets from the repository.
